title: aeschynanthus teysmannianus
intro: Aeschynanthus teysmannianus, also known as the Lipstick Plant, is a flowering plant species in the genus Aeschynanthus native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties that help to reduce fever and combat infections. The health benefits of Aeschynanthus teysmannianus include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Aeschynanthus teysmannianus include infusions and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or combining the plant material with a solvent to extract its medicinal compounds.
